title: Bonus Module: Integrating Beads with GitHub
description: Design and build a bonus module covering Beads ↔ GitHub integration: bd config set github.org/repo, syncing issues to GitHub Issues, PR linking, using bd alongside gh CLI. Approved in course design spec.

title: Transition to implementation plan
description: Invoke writing-plans skill to create the implementation plan for building the Beads course modules. Brainstorming phase complete — design spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-24-beads-course-design.md.
close_reason: Spec implemented: all 5 course modules written in Antora/Asciidoc, config files updated, template pages removed

title: Future: Power user module (formulas, molecules, gates, integrations)
description: Advanced workflow builder content. Formulas/molecules/gates, multi-repo config, GitHub/Jira integrations. Deferred until solo modules are validated.

title: Future: Team setup module (multi-writer Dolt remote, onboarding)
description: Expansion beyond solo scope. Cover shared Dolt remote, bd dolt push/pull, multi-writer collision safety, onboarding teammates. Deferred until solo modules are validated.
